page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-30 is a general-purpose server powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 30 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 15 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 120 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Cache architecture includes 32 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 32 MB L3 cache. It lacks local NVMe storage and does not include any GPU accelerators.

Benchmark results show strong performance in single-core CPU execution and text processing, alongside a strong PassMark memory score. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average range. For machine learning workloads, the server achieves top-tier text generation speeds with small 135M parameter LLM models, though prompt processing for large 70B models is weak, reflecting the lack of dedicated hardware acceleration.

From a resource density perspective, the instance offers a standard general-purpose profile with dedicated CPU allocation. The lack of bundled local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses represents a clear tradeoff, requiring external block storage for persistent data. It provides a stable, predictable performance baseline for workloads that do not require high-speed local disk I/O or GPU acceleration.

This server is configured for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, software compilation, database operations, and text processing. It is also suitable for running small-scale language model inference and general application hosting.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-30 is a general-purpose server featuring 30 dedicated vCPUs and 120 GB of RAM, powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 15 physical cores. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU execution, text processing, and memory scores, while multi-core operations, memory bandwidth, and database tasks perform in the average tier. For machine learning, it achieves top-tier text generation speeds on small 135M models but exhibits weak performance on large 70B models. The lack of local NVMe storage and public IPv4 addresses requires external storage and networking configurations. This server is suited for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, software compilation, database operations, and small-scale model inference.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-30 is a general-purpose server featuring 30 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 120 GB of RAM, and strong single-core performance, designed for web serving and database workloads.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and strong single-core performance for standard enterprise workloads.

Strong single-core CPU performance and memory benchmark scores
